creator: suttonj@interconnect.com.au
text:
Prodosemu is an Apple2e prodos emulator which is text only. The program
comes with copyright apple2e roms and, therefore, cannot be distributed.

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/prodosemu.tar.gz

Please add this to the ports collection when/if you have a moment. If there
are any problems please email me. Thanks, Joel...
